wins: AIPC category growth from less than 10% to over 50% by 2026
Lunar Lake delivers superior performance at half the power
Panther Lake will be first client CPU on Intel 18A with improved cost structure
Cost reduction plan targeting 15% head count reduction by 2025
Smart Capital strategy with $11B to $13B net capital spending in 2024
risks: Q3 revenue growth slower than expected due to inventory digestion
Lunar Lake's reliance on external wafers pressures gross margins
Mobileye lowers revenue and income guidance for H2 due to China conditions
Export controls impacting client business in China
Competitive pricing and unfavorable product mix affecting margins
